description: <b>Style Note</b> Being fashionable means being able to combine the right amount of comfort with a bucket load of style in your outfit. wrangler goes charming and cute with this comfortable top, pair it with your favourite pair of jeans and flip flops and accessorise subtly. <b>Product Details</b> Baby pink top, has a mandarin collar with a split V neckline, full buttoned placket, short sleeves, pin tucks at the yoke and a curved hemline <b>Material and Care</b>  100% cotton  Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent  Turn inside out before washing and drying  Do not bleach  Do not wring  Tumble dry or flat dry in shade  Use warm iron <b>Size and Fit</b> Regular fit  The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M <b>Style Note</b>Being fashionable means being able to combine the right amount of comfort with a bucket load of style in your outfit. Wrangler goes charming and cute with this comfortable top, pair it with your favourite pair of jeans and flip flops and accessorise subtly.<b>Product Details</b>Baby pink top, has a mandarin collar with a split V neckline, full buttoned placket, short sleeves, pin tucks at the yoke and a curved hemline<b>Material and Care</b> 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach Do not wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Use warm iron<b>Size and Fit</b>Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
